title: acacia citriodora
intro: Acacia citriodora, also known as lemon-scented acacia or citrate acacia, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, characterized by its fragrant yellow flowers and pinnate leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Acacia citriodora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
